title: Weekend radio show
explanation:
Weekend radio show

Listen to a short radio introduction.

Transcript

Presenter: Good morning and welcome back to City Weekend. In today's programme, we will speak to a local chef about affordable meals, review a new exhibition at the art gallery, and hear listeners' tips for saving money while travelling. Stay with us after the break for a live interview with a young musician from Manchester.

questions.text: The programme will speak to [*a local chef|a doctor|a football coach].
questions.feedback: The presenter mentions a local chef.

questions.text: There will be a review of [*an exhibition|a film|a train station].
questions.feedback: A new exhibition at the art gallery.

questions.text: Listeners will share tips about [*saving money while travelling|buying houses|studying abroad].
The final live interview is with [*a young musician|a teacher|an actor].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The show is called City ____.  | *Weekend | Morning | Travel
questions.feedback: City Weekend is the programme title.

questions.text: The chef talks about ____ meals. | *affordable | healthy only | luxury
The interview with the musician is after the ____.  | *break | gallery | news
The gallery exhibition is described as ____.  | *new | closing | international
The programme is probably on [*radio|television only|a podcast with no host].
questions.feedback: The style is a radio introduction.

questions.text: The presenter uses the word [*welcome|goodbye|sorry] near the start.
The topics are [*varied|all about sport|all political].
The tone is [*friendly and informative|formal and legal|negative].
